# Campaign Artifact Pipeline

## Pipeline

```text
brief
→ buyer state
→ math model
→ hypotheses
→ tactic selection
→ variants
→ proof path
→ platform packet
→ measurement plan
→ results
→ posterior update
→ learning memo
→ memory update
```

## Artifact contract

Every step must produce a Markdown file.

## No skip rule

The agent may compress steps, but it cannot omit:

```text
buyer state
tactic selection
measurement plan
learning memo
```
